title: poa telata
intro: Poa telata, also known as Salt Grass or Salt Grass Poa, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds, coughs, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Poa telata include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Poa telata often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
